name: Zerodha Trading Platform — Avro Schema Governance
scenario: Upgrade the Zerodha Kafka pipeline from JSON to Avro. Define TradeExecutedEvent schema, generate Java classes, configure producers and consumers with Avro serializers, and demonstrate safe schema evolution: adding fields and what happens when you try to make breaking changes.
description: Full Avro migration: .avsc schema file, avro-maven-plugin, KafkaAvroSerializer/Deserializer, schema evolution demonstration. Shows two compatible schema versions and one rejected breaking change.

core.description: TradeExecutedEvent.avsc in src/main/avro: 7 fields (tradeId, userId, symbol, qty, price, totalValue, tradeType as enum [BUY,SELL]). Proper namespace: com.codequest.events.avro.
pom.xml: avro, kafka-avro-serializer (Confluent) dependencies + avro-maven-plugin with generate-sources goal pointing to src/main/avro.

application.properties (producer): KafkaAvroSerializer + schema.registry.url=http://localhost:8081. application.properties (consumer): KafkaAvroDeserializer + schema.registry.url + specific.avro.reader=true.
TradeEventPublisher @Service: builds TradeExecutedEvent using generated builder (newBuilder().setX().build()). Sends to 'trade-executed' with symbol as key.
TradeAnalyticsConsumer @Service: @KafkaListener with TradeExecutedEvent parameter. Uses getX() accessors. Logs symbol, qty, price.
Schema v2: add 'exchange' field (nullable string, null default) — show is_compatible=true. Schema v3 attempt: rename 'price'→'unitPrice' — show is_compatible=false. README explains both.

bonus.description: Add OrderPlacedEvent.avsc with nested records (Customer, OrderItem array, Address). Generate and use in producer. 3 nested Avro records in one event.
Add schema compatibility check to CI: a test that calls Schema Registry REST API and asserts is_compatible=true for proposed schema v2. Fails the build if compatibility check fails.

Demonstrate schema evolution: write two @KafkaListener versions — one using v1 TradeExecutedEvent (no exchange), one using v2 (with exchange). Both consume from same topic. V1 consumer sees exchange=null (default). V2 consumer sees actual exchange value.

data_to_use:
Schema v1 fields: tradeId, userId, symbol, qty, price, totalValue, tradeType
Schema v2 (backward compatible): + exchange (nullable string, null default)
Schema v3 attempt (BREAKING): rename price→unitPrice → Schema Registry REJECTS

Test events:
TradeExecutedEvent v1: TRD-001, U01, TCS, 10, 3890.0, 38900.0, BUY
TradeExecutedEvent v2: same + exchange='NSE'

Compatibility check:
v1→v2: {is_compatible: true} (added with default)
v1→v3: {is_compatible: false} (renamed field)
example_output:
# mvn generate-sources output:
[INFO] Processing schema file: TradeExecutedEvent.avsc
[INFO] Generated TradeExecutedEvent.java, TradeType.java

# Producer startup:
KafkaAvroSerializer: Registered schema 'com.codequest.events.avro.TradeExecutedEvent'
Schema ID: 42 for subject 'trade-executed-value'

# Consumer receives:
[TradeAnalyticsConsumer] Trade: symbol=TCS qty=10 price=3890.0 type=BUY userId=U01

# Schema v2 compatibility check:
curl POST /compatibility/... → {"is_compatible": true} ✓
Schema v2 registered as ID: 43

# Schema v3 (rename) rejection:
curl POST /compatibility/... → {"is_compatible": false} ✗
[ERROR] Cannot deploy: breaking schema change detected
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. specific.avro.reader=true is the most-forgotten consumer property. Confluent repo URL: https://packages.confluent.io/maven/. Nullable Avro field: {type:[null,string], default:null} — null must come FIRST in the union. Generated class uses getX() not x(). avro-maven-plugin phase=generate-sources, goal=schema.
submission_instructions: GitHub push. README documents schema evolution (v1→v2 compatible, v1→v3 breaking). Include compatibility check curl commands and their responses. pom.xml and .avsc files included.
tips_for_success: specific.avro.reader=true: without this, @KafkaListener gets GenericRecord not your class
Confluent repo: must be declared in pom.xml to download kafka-avro-serializer
stringType=String in plugin config: generates String instead of CharSequence — cleaner code
Run mvn generate-sources after changing .avsc — generated class must be recompiled
concepts_reinforced: Avro schema definition (.avsc) with record, enum, and union types
avro-maven-plugin generates Java at compile time
KafkaAvroSerializer with Schema Registry for producer
Backward compatible schema evolution (add with default)
Breaking changes rejected by Schema Registry at deploy time
